---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature related to a problem?**
A short description of the problem (e.g. "I always need to …").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any other approach (e.g. workarounds, other tools).

**Provider / area**
Which provider or area does this affect? (e.g. all providers, aws-lambda only, daemon, CLI, config.)

**Additional context**
Examples, docs links, or references.
